start journey equipment resources

Resources

...under construction...

Right now, this is just a loose (an incomplete) collection of resources that were useful to me.

  • A minor loop by Eugene Friesen
  • The Rake: a funky etude by Jacob Szekely
  • electric cello comparison that helped me decide: NS Design CR5 vs Yamaha SVC
  • Mike Block: Contemporary Cello Etudes - Studies in Style & Technique
  • The Improvisors Guide To The Cello (Jacob Szekely)
  • The Last Lick You'll Ever Need To Learn (Jacob Szekely)
  • Cello / Loop (Jacob Szekely, 5 Improvisations: Neo Soul/LoFi/Hiphop/Math Rock Cello with Ableton Loops and Electronics)
  • Groove Cello Academy (Daniel Delaney)
  • AltStrings Academy (Caroline McCaskey)
  • Chop exercises (Stephan Braun - just a short video, but there's really much to work out here!)
disclaimer
